title: Talk:2025 Gaza City offensive
wikitext:
{{Contentious topics/talk notice|topic=a-i}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Military history|b1=no|b2=no|b3=yes|b4=yes|b5=yes|Post-Cold-War=yes|Middle-Eastern=yes}} {{WikiProject Israel Palestine Collaboration}} {{WikiProject Israel|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Palestine|importance=low}} }} == Note Holocaust of Gazan City == Note the imminent holocaust by the zionist jews to be inflicted on one million innocent and defenseless Palestinian civilians. "In doing so, he made clear that the goal, policy, and means of Israel's Gaza City offensive is not freedom for Gazans, but total destruction." Source - https://archive.ph/jdTwp#selection-855.108-855.249 [[Special:Contributions/2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE|2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE]] ([[User talk:2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE|talk]]) 01:50, 22 August 2025 (UTC) :The residents of Gaza City are not evacuating after the IDF has notified them several times, so what the IDF is doing is simply putting pressure on them, and this is completely normal. Any country that would have encountered this situation would have done exactly the same thing, which is to put pressure on the civilians. If we don't, they will be hurt more. [[Special:Contributions/2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326|2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326]] ([[User talk:2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326|talk]]) 13:21, 5 September 2025 (UTC) ::Hamas wants to use the citizens of Gaza as human shields. What do you expect? [[User:Liygbiygiuhiuh|Liygbiygiuhiuh]] ([[User talk:Liygbiygiuhiuh|talk]]) 14:17, 7 September 2025 (UTC) :The Israeli Defense Forces is a multi ethnic and multi religious force. The purpose is ultimately expanding the borders of Israel, they would massacre and pillage this city regardless of who is there so long as an opposing terrorist organization exists there. They could care less about religion or nationality of the victims, as they have bombed locations housing Jewish and/or Israeli hostages multiple times without hesitation. [[User:GNorman1987|GNorman1987]] ([[User talk:GNorman1987|talk]]) 07:49, 24 September 2025 (UTC) == Rename Article to Gazan City Massacre/Siege/Mass Murder/Genocide/Holocaust == There is no offensive taking place since offensive implies a military action. This is not a military action since there is no opposing forces, Hamas has no combat power for months if not years. This is a wholesale serial killing of a million starving and defenseless people for the express purpose of ethnically cleansing and exterminating them, these facts are constantly verified at all levels by the "Israeli" political, military and intelligence apparatuses. The IDF is not an army in any meaningful sense of the word, it is a roving band of rapists, torturers, serial killers and thieves. Please edit the article to reflect these facts, thanks. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[Special:Contributions/2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE|2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE]] ([[User talk:2605:A601:55AF:3200:967C:4298:D4BD:BBFE#top|talk]]) 22:57, 24 August 2025 (UTC) :I think "siege" is most neutral at this point.'''[[User talk:Vice regent|VR]]''' (Please [[Template:Ping|ping]] on reply) 11:50, 1 September 2025 (UTC) :Multiple reliable sources discredit your claims about Hamas supposedly having no combat power. There is already an article about the [[Gaza genocide]], and the manner in which Israeli is doing its military operations in Gaza City (pushing from neighborhood to neighborhood) is not like a siege. [[User:Evaporation123|Evaporation123]] ([[User talk:Evaporation123|talk]]) 19:15, 3 September 2025 (UTC) :There are rival forces, Hamas' Gaza City Battalion is there, which is also the last Hamas battalion to emerge from Gaza, and Hamas will most likely surrender or be defeated after the IDF defeats the Gaza City Battalion. + The IDF has notified Gazans living in Gaza City to evacuate, but they are not evacuating, so the IDF is putting pressure on them, and this is completely normal. If they stay in the city and do not evacuate, they will be harmed. {{Rpa}} [[Special:Contributions/2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326|2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326]] ([[User talk:2A06:C701:95CD:8600:631B:512C:1A18:6326|talk]]) 13:17, 5 September 2025 (UTC) :I definitely think any group routinely destroying Israeli tanks qualifies as a combatant… [[User:GNorman1987|GNorman1987]] ([[User talk:GNorman1987|talk]]) 07:43, 24 September 2025 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 7 September 2025 == {{edit extended-protected|2025 Gaza City offensive|answered=yes}} Change X: The Israeli offensive is set to further intensify the ongoing [[Gaza humanitarian crisis (2023–present)|humanitarian crisis in the Gaza Strip]], with the [[Integrated Food Security Phase Classification]] (IPC) having confirmed a [[famine]] in Gaza City on 22 August.{{Cite web |date=2025-08-22 |title=For the first time, the world's food crises authority announces a famine in Gaza |url=https://apnews.com/article/gaza-famine-hunger-israel-ceasefire-a5f88e20db2a5c4f754117de9bdada69 |access-date=2025-08-22 |website=AP News |language=en}} Change Y: Remove this section, the report is backed by the antisemitic United Nations. [[User:Liygbiygiuhiuh|Liygbiygiuhiuh]] ([[User talk:Liygbiygiuhiuh|talk]]) 14:25, 7 September 2025 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' This content is supported by a citation to a reliable source, the [[Associated Press]]. [[User:Day Creature|Day Creature]] ([[User talk:Day Creature|talk]]) 17:21, 7 September 2025 (UTC) == Edit request 12 September 2025 == {{Edit extended-protected|2025 Gaza City offensive|answered=yes}} '''Description of suggested change:''' To the background please add the key religious demography differences between [[Gaza City]] and the rest of the strip. I think this is the right amount if detail for the small but distinctive group, they were a group who made Gacy City different from the rest of the strip. The background needs other topics as well, but please accept my contribution of this part. If you don't want it too weighted to this topic, pick your favourite sentence or two from this and add just that?
"The vast majority of the [[Gaza Strip]]'s inhabitants are [[Palestine #Religion |Palestinian]] [[Muslims]], but [[Gaza City]] is home to the [[Gaza Strip]]'s small [[Palestinian Christians]] minority.{{cite news| date = 24 April 2025 |title=The pope phoned a priest in Gaza every day |url=https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2025/04/24/the-pope-phoned-a-priest-in-gaza-every-day |work=The Economist}}{{cite news |title=We're orphans now, say Gaza Catholics the Pope called daily |url=https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyqgy6m8e6o |work=www.bbc.com |date=22 April 2025}} They are one of the world's oldest Christian communities.{{cite news| date = 1 November 2023 |last1=Mallinder |first1=Lorraine |title=Under Israeli attack: Who are the Christians of Gaza? |url=https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/11/1/under-israeli-attack-who-are-the-christians-of-gaza | work = [[Al Jazeera English]] |language=en}}{{cite news |title=How world’s oldest Christian community in Gaza is on brink of extinction | url = https://www.firstpost.com/explainers/how-worlds-oldest-christian-community-in-gaza-is-on-brink-of-extinction-13376282.html | work = [[Firstpost]] | location = [[Mumbai]], India | date = 11 November 2023 |language=en}} All three of the [[List of churches in Palestine |Gaza Strip's churches]] are in Gaza City ([[Church of Saint Porphyrius |Greek Orthodox]], [[Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem |Catholic]], and [[Gaza Baptist Church |Baptist]]).{{cite news| date = 1 November 2023 |last1=Mallinder |first1=Lorraine |title=Under Israeli attack: Who are the Christians of Gaza? |url=https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/11/1/under-israeli-attack-who-are-the-christians-of-gaza | work = [[Al Jazeera English]] |language=en}}{{cite news |title=How world’s oldest Christian community in Gaza is on brink of extinction | url = https://www.firstpost.com/explainers/how-worlds-oldest-christian-community-in-gaza-is-on-brink-of-extinction-13376282.html | work = [[Firstpost]] | location = [[Mumbai]], India | date = 11 November 2023 |language=en}}{{cite news |title=In photos: Gaza begins Christmas celebrations with light up of tree in public square |url=https://www.newarab.com/news/photos-gaza-begins-christmas-celebrations |work=[[The New Arab]] |date=13 December 2021}}{{cite news |title=In Gaza, Christian and Muslim Palestinians celebrate Christmas together |url=https://www.arabnews.com/node/2221441/middle-east |work=Arab News |date=24 December 2022 |language=en}} There were nearly 1000 Christians in Gaza City at the start of the war, by April 2025, 36 or more Palestinian Christians in Gaza had been killed and many others had been forced out.{{cite news| date = 24 April 2025 |title=The pope phoned a priest in Gaza every day |url=https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2025/04/24/the-pope-phoned-a-priest-in-gaza-every-day |work=The Economist}} Before the onset of the new offensive, 500 people had been living in the [[Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem |Catholic]] [[Holy Family Church, Gaza |Holy Family Church]], because most of the city had been destroyed.{{cite news |title=Palestinian Christians in Gaza: Pope Francis never forgot us – DW – 04/24/2025 |url=https://www.dw.com/en/palestinian-christians-in-gaza-pope-francis-never-forgot-us/a-72324538 |work=dw.com |date=24 April 2025 |language=en}} Many arrived from the [[Greek Orthodox Patriarchate of Jerusalem |Greek Orthodox]] church, the [[Church of Saint Porphyrius]], after [[Church of Saint Porphyrius airstrike |it was bombed]].{{cite news |title=Gaza church remembers Pope Francis as its 'shield' |url=https://www.nbcnews.com/news/pope-francis/pope-francis-gaza-church-war-catholic-rcna202189 |work=NBC News |date=22 April 2025 |language=en}}"

September 2025 (UTC) :I added a brief part referencing the Gazan Christian community in the Reactions section, but other than that, a full dive into demographics would be a massive tangent. Remember this article is about a military offensive, and the background should stick to the article subject. Your paragraph would fit in better at [[Gaza City#Religion]]. [[User:Evaporation123|Evaporation123]] ([[User talk:Evaporation123|talk]]) 20:24, 24 September 2025 (UTC) == "Residential Areas" and Following the Geneva Convention == "Residential areas destroyed systemically" is a biased phrase for a non biased place like Wikipedia, using a source known to be anti-Israel and with propogandic material. We wouldn't source Israeli articles about propaganda, same said about Arab sites with clear bias, a violation of Wikipedias sourcing rule. War is war. If this "systemic" destruction is unique from every other war, then every war on Wikipedia should include this, but that's illogical. The part should be removed as it lacks proper sourcing without bias. In war, cities are bombed and villages destroyed. Nowhere in the Geneva Convention is this considered outside the doctrine of warfare. I understand how controversial this is, but im being honest as a former soldier that war is very misconstructed in modern era, things NATO countries and others have done are just as bad as Palestine or Israel. Tl;Dr: Can we use proper, non biased sources and follow the Geneva Convention, not create a fictional doctrine on how wars are fought? [[User:LilPeepers99|LilPeepers99]] ([[User talk:LilPeepers99|talk]]) 13:11, 17 September 2025 (UTC) :I'm not sure that I follow your logic. Surely, if this were unique to this war, then every other war's articles should NOT include this. --[[Special:Contributions/86.31.178.164|86.31.178.164]] ([[User talk:86.31.178.164|talk]]) 14:27, 18 September 2025 (UTC) :Israel has publicly stated it intends to raze the city. And also, see [[WP:BIASED]]. [[User:Evaporation123|Evaporation123]] ([[User talk:Evaporation123|talk]]) 20:29, 24 September 2025 (UTC) == Small Grammatical Error == There is a small grammatical error in the wikibox. Under "Casualties and Losses", it states "less than 200 militants killed." It should be "fewer" rather than "less" because "militant" is a countable noun. [[User:Achthal|Achthal]] ([[User talk:Achthal|talk]]) 01:21, 6 October 2025 (UTC) :{{fixed}} thank you! [[User:Lova Falk|Lova Falk]] ([[User talk:Lova Falk|talk]]) 12:36, 11 October 2025 (UTC) == Edit request 13 October 2025 == {{edit extended-protected|answered=yes}} '''Description of suggested change:''' '''Diff:''' {{Text diff |1= ORIGINAL_WIKITEXT |2= CHANGED_WIKITEXT }} [[Special:Contributions/79.181.170.225|79.181.170.225]] ([[User talk:79.181.170.225|talk]]) 11:04, 13 October 2025 (UTC) Add to the result that the IDF captured about 50% of Gaza City until the withdrawal on October 10 due to the ceasefire. https://news.walla.co.il/item/3783530 :[[File:Red question icon with gradient background.svg|20px|link=|alt=]] '''Not done:''' it's not clear what changes you want to be made. Please mention the specific changes in a [[WP:EDITXY|"change X to Y" format]] and provide a [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable source]] if appropriate. [[User:Jcoolbro|Jcoolbro]] ([[User talk:Jcoolbro|talk]]) [[Special:Contributions/Jcoolbro|(c)]] 16:37, 16 October 2025 (UTC) == Error in the template == Main offensive: 15 September – 4 October 2025 (3 months, 1 week and 2 days)？ That is a mistake. It only lasted for 3 weeks. [[User:GrandCeres|GrandCeres]] ([[User talk:GrandCeres|talk]]) 08:23, 24 December 2025 (UTC) :{{fixed}} Not by me though.
